title: aeschynanthus janowskyi
intro: Aeschynanthus janowskyi, also known as the Janowsky's Lipstick Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Aeschynanthus. It is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia, valued for its bright red flowers and potential medicinal properties. The plant's leaves and roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Aeschynanthus janowskyi can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusate, and may also be used in topical preparations to support skin health and wound healing.
